description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker predominantly blue in color, featuring three white diagonal stripes on each side, characteristic of Adidas branding. The shoe has a white rubber sole and a padded white collar at the heel, providing ankle support. The upper material appears to be suede or nubuck, with visible creasing and some signs of wear, especially around the toe and sides. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with blue laces, and the tongue displays a blue and gold Adidas label. The interior is lined with a darker material, and the overall silhouette is slim and sporty, suitable for casual or athletic urban use. The shoe shows some dirt and scuff marks, indicating it has been worn outdoors.
description: A blue high-top Adidas sneaker with white stripes, a white sole, and visible signs of wear. Features a padded collar, criss-cross laces, and a branded tongue label.
description_view_0: Left side view showing three white stripes, blue suede upper, and white padded collar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the criss-cross blue laces, rounded toe, and Adidas label on the tongue.
description_view_2: Right side view with Adidas branding, three white stripes, and visible wear on the blue upper.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the white padded collar, blue heel, and partial view of the interior lining.
attribute_logo: Rectangular blue and gold Adidas label on the tongue; gold Adidas text and logo on the side near the collar.
